canonical_name: Signal Transducer and Activator of Transcription 5
step_rationale: Transcription factor driving T cell cytokine responses; amplifies adaptive immune activation.
mechanism: STAT5 signaling propagates T cell activation and cytokine production during acute myocardial infarction inflammation.

references.title: Single-cell transcriptomic analysis of peripheral blood mononuclear cells reveals key immune responses in ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction.
